home.protectionActiveSubtitle: Monitoring incoming calls for scam activity

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.emptySubtitle: Detected scam calls will appear here
alerts.noMyAlerts: No scam calls detected on your device
alerts.noGuardingSub: Pair with someone as their guardian to see their alerts here

settings.title: Settings
settings.guardianSetupSubtitle: Nominate a trusted contact to receive alerts

guardian.title: Guardian
guardian.qrModalBody: Ask your guardian to scan this code with their Escronet app.
guardian.removeGuardianBody: This guardian will no longer receive alerts from your device.
guardian.removeSelfBody: You will no longer receive alerts from this person.
guardian.noGuardiansSub: Tap "Add Guardian" to generate a QR code and invite someone.
guardian.noGuardingSub: Scan a QR code shared by someone who wants you as their guardian.
guardian.cameraPermissionBody: Camera access is required to scan QR codes.
guardian.errorUsed: This link has already been used.

smsBanner.title: SCAM ALERT
smsBanner.body: You received an OTP code while on a call with an unknown number. Do NOT share it.
